personal.name: Matias Bianchin Mazzer
personal.headline: Frontend Engineer & AI Developer | Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind

summary: Frontend Engineer with 4+ years of experience specialized in Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Currently expanding into AI development through Anthropic's official courses, building production-grade integrations with the Claude API. Has delivered numerous projects including full-stack work covering frontend, backend APIs, authentication, and database design.

experience.description: Software consultancy where I work as a Frontend Engineer, delivering custom solutions across multiple client projects.

clients.name: MasColectividad
highlights: Built and delivered a production SPA supporting multi-role permissions (admin, editor, viewer) and 6+ CRUD modules.
Developed scalable frontend modules with API integrations and reusable component architecture.
Used AI-assisted development workflows (Claude Code) to accelerate implementation, prototyping, and debugging.
Owned end-to-end QA across web and mobile, identifying 30+ critical defects before release.

clients.name: Wirall.com
highlights: Developed the consulting firm's marketing landing page from scratch based on Figma designs.
Delivered pixel-perfect implementation across mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints.

clients.name: Surx
highlights: Built a new responsive landing page from Figma using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Owned full frontend implementation and deployment.

clients.name: MediaInbox
highlights: Redesigned key product views from Figma specs, simplifying workflows and reducing friction in core user journeys.
Delivered frontend UI improvements with strong attention to usability and visual consistency.

clients.name: DALT Importaciones
highlights: Designed and built an e-commerce platform end-to-end as sole developer, covering UX/UI, frontend, backend APIs, authentication, database design, and deployment.
Built frontend with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS; integrated Supabase (Auth, PostgreSQL, Storage) and Node.js backend services.

clients.name: Ligo Peru
highlights: Consolidated 5 legacy systems into a single Next.js / TypeScript application, improving consistency and reducing operational overhead.
Built scalable API consumption patterns and modular frontend architecture for multi-domain product features.
Worked with QA automation workflows using Playwright and NestJS-based backend services.
Contributed to CI/CD workflows using Jenkins, Kubernetes, and GCP.
Participated in frontend technical interviews and engineering hiring decisions.

clients.name: Levara
highlights: Delivered a responsive React SPA with Context-based state management and REST API integration in under 3 months.
Implemented mobile-first responsive design using CSS and Bootstrap, ensuring consistent UX across 4 breakpoints and cross-browser QA.

clients.name: Internal Automation & Integrations
highlights: Built Node.js automation services integrating MercadoLibre APIs, OAuth authentication, AFIP electronic invoicing, and PDF generation.
Automated previously manual operational workflows, significantly reducing repetitive workload and operational friction.
Developed Python-based automation / scraping pipelines for client business workflows.

clients.name: No Letting Go
highlights: Built and maintained production frontend features using React, jQuery, SCSS, and Django templates, contributing to 15+ production releases.
Created and executed 200+ manual test cases across web and mobile (iOS / Android), improving release confidence and reducing escaped defects.
Collaborated with automation teams reviewing Selenium and Playwright regression suites across platforms and browsers.
Stepped in as Acting Project Manager during team transition, coordinating sprint planning, delivery, and client communication.
Assisted instructors in backend (Node.js, MongoDB, Express) and frontend (React) bootcamp cohorts.
Supported students with code reviews, debugging sessions, and project feedback during live classes.
Strengthened communication and mentoring skills by explaining technical concepts to developers at different experience levels.

projects.name: AI Portfolio Bot
projects.description: This very chatbot — a digital twin built with the Claude API and Google Calendar integration, allowing recruiters to learn about my background and book meetings directly through conversation.

projects.name: Landing pages portfolio
projects.description: Several production landing pages built from Figma designs, delivered pixel-perfect across all breakpoints.
